task_completion.description: Verify that the Company Name and Address are configured in the Company Details section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Vtiger CRM Company Details settings page, the Organization Name field contains 'Apex Wholesale Distribution' and the Address field contains '4500 Commerce Blvd'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the remaining company contact details are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Company Details settings page, City is 'Chicago', State is 'IL', Postal Code is '60607', Country is 'USA', Phone contains '312-555-0144', and Website contains 'apexwholesale.example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Outgoing SMTP Server, User, and From Email are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outgoing Server settings page, the Server Name field contains 'smtp.example-mail.com' (port 587 may also be visible), User Name is 'smtp_user_apex', and From Email is 'billing@apexwholesale.example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that SMTP Authentication is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outgoing Server settings page, the 'Requires Authentication' checkbox is checked or enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Help Desk Support Email and Maximum Upload Size are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Configuration Editor page, the Help Desk Support Email field is 'support@apexwholesale.example.com' and Maximum Upload Size is set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Default Module is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Configuration Editor page, the Default Module dropdown or field is set to 'Potentials'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not a text editor or terminal modifying database or config files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open and used to alter the DOM text to match the expected values.

integrity.description: Verify that the settings were actually saved and not just typed into the fields without submitting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages (e.g., 'Settings updated', 'Saved successfully') or the UI returning to a view mode (non-edit mode) showing the updated values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Company Details: Name 'Apex Wholesale Distribution', Address containing '4500 Commerce Blvd', City 'Chicago', State 'IL', Postal Code '60607', Country 'USA', Phone containing '312-555-0144', Website containing 'apexwholesale.example.com'. Expected SMTP Settings: Server containing 'smtp.example-mail.com', User 'smtp_user_apex', From Email 'billing@apexwholesale.example.com', Authentication Enabled. Expected Configuration Editor Settings: Help Desk Support Email 'support@apexwholesale.example.com', Maximum Upload Size '5', Default Module 'Potentials'.
